data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="硫酸钾溶解度实验" goal="探究硫酸钾在水中的溶解度随温度变化的规律，并观察其溶解和结晶现象。" difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="beaker_1" type="beaker" capacity="100ml" />
      <Component id="graduated_cylinder_1" type="graduated_cylinder" capacity="10ml" />
      <Component id="glass_rod_1" type="glass_rod" />
      <Component id="stand_1" type="stand" />
      <Component id="wire_gauze_1" type="wire_gauze" />
      <Component id="alcohol_lamp_1" type="alcohol_lamp" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="distilled_water" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="potassium_sulfate" state="solid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      
      
      <Add vessel="beaker_1" reagent="H2O" volume="10 mL" tool="graduated_cylinder_1" id="step_0" />
      
      <Add vessel="beaker_1" reagent="K2SO4" mass="3 g" id="step_1" />
      
      <Stir vessel="beaker_1" id="step_2" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_3" />
      
      <Add vessel="beaker_1" reagent="K2SO4" mass="3 g" id="step_4" />
      <Stir vessel="beaker_1" id="step_5" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_6" />
      
      <Attach vessel="beaker_1" support="wire_gauze_1" id="step_7" />
      <Attach vessel="wire_gauze_1" support="stand_1" id="step_8" />
      
      <Heat vessel="beaker_1" id="step_9" />
      <Stir vessel="beaker_1" id="step_10" />
      <Wait time="60s" id="step_11" />
      
      
      <Add vessel="beaker_1" reagent="K2SO4" mass="3 g" id="step_12" />
      <Stir vessel="beaker_1" id="step_13" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_14" />
      
      <Cool vessel="beaker_1" id="step_15" />
      <Wait time="300s" id="step_16" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 在室温下配制硫酸钾溶液：量取蒸馏水，分批加入硫酸钾并搅拌、等待，观察溶解情况。
组装加热装置：将烧杯放置在石棉网上，并固定于铁架台。
加热溶液并搅拌，促进硫酸钾溶解，观察溶解现象。
在高温下继续加入硫酸钾并搅拌、等待，观察溶解度变化。
冷却溶液，观察硫酸钾结晶现象，分析溶解度随温度变化的规律。
